landing.title: tools
landing.sub: Small calculators and solvers for the parts of the game that get tedious by hand.

slush.title: slush station
slush.desc: Solver for the in-game event. Tracks per-slot feedback and suggests your next pick.

tz.title: time tool
tz.desc: UTC ↔ any timezone, both ways. Drag a pin to align the whole alliance.

upgrade.title: upgrade planner
upgrade.desc: Resources and time for any upgrade. Pick what you have and your target — get the exact cost.

gingado.title: penguin wobble
gingado.desc: Pachinko sandbox for the penguin event. Estimates the payout per ball and which penguin to drop from.

ghost.title: more cooking
ghost.desc: Stay frosty — more tools on the way.

territory.title: territory planner
territory.desc: Plan your alliance hive — place the HQ and banners and see the territory they cover.

calendar.title: event calendar
calendar.desc: Upcoming recurring events projected from your server age — SvS, championships, castle battles and more.

tour.placeCaption: palette → fills the next empty slot

gingado.title: penguin wobble
gingado.sub: Pachinko sandbox — estimate the average payout and which penguin pays best.
gingado.editNote: Drag anything to match your screen. Bars have two ends — drag each to tilt. The dotted line is the throw's average aim.
gingado.compareHint: Drop a comparison to rank the three columns by average payout.
gingado.launchHint: The exit angle is sampled every throw — you don't aim. Randomness (±) is how wide that draw opens. Base tilt usually stays near 0; nudge it only if throws pull to one side. "Toward edges" makes a near-straight drop rare, like the real game.
gingado.warn: Elastic bounce plus obstacles make this chaotic: you can estimate the average over many balls, never the next one. The numbers are an approximation — only as good as how well the layout, angle randomness and bounce match the game. The real log is what calibrates it.
gingado.distHintEmpty: Pick a penguin and drop one (or run a batch) to see its distribution.
gingado.distHint: {name} penguin, {n} balls: 500 in {jp}%, touches a resource {hits}× on average.
gingado.realIntro: Tap the pot each ball actually landed in. The real average is what tells you whether the sim matches the game.
gingado.dataHint: Copy this to save it elsewhere, or paste a layout and apply.

tour.wobbleCaption: angle is sampled each drop · you don't aim
tour.editCaption: pins, bubbles, tilting bars — all movable
tour.simCaption: watch the average settle · log the real ones

tz.title: time tool
tz.sub: UTC anchored. Drag a pin and the whole list re-sorts.

tour.welcomeCaption: convert utc · both ways · all timezones

upgrade.title: upgrade planner
upgrade.sub: Plan any upgrade — set where you are and where you're headed, get the exact resources and time.
upgrade.unverifiedNote: Not yet cross-checked against multiple sources — don't rely on it for big spends.
upgrade.pickRange: Pick a target higher than your current level.

buildings.sub: Resource & time cost between two building levels.
buildings.queuesNote: The 2nd queue needs an active build queue (VIP perk or purchase).

gear.sub: Materials to upgrade your 6 chief gear pieces. Set each piece's current and target tier.
gear.powerNote: ⚠ Stat values are community-sourced (cross-checked across 3 calculators) — verify in-game. Set-bonus (all-troop) stats not included.

charms.sub: Materials for all 18 chief charm slots (3 per gear piece). Set each charm's current and target level.

troops.sub: Resources to train troops. Add a row per troop type, tier and quantity.

research.sub: Total resources to max each research tree from zero. Toggle the trees you want.
research.note: Single-source data, pending cross-check. Assumes maxing every node from scratch; War Academy / Fire Crystal research not included yet.

pets.sub: Pet Food and advancement materials to level your pets. Add a row per pet.
pets.note: Single-source data (whiteoutsurvival.wiki), pending cross-check. Costs are keyed by max-level tier.

upgrade.addHint: Add what you want to start — only what you care about.

boosters.title: boosters
boosters.hint: Enable each booster you've unlocked and set its value — they stack and reduce the times below. Either enter your in-game total in one row OR break it into sources, not both. Per-timer effects (Chief Orders, Alliance Help) aren't included.

heroes.sub: Plan a roster of heroes for SvS — stars, exclusive gear & the materials you still need.
heroes.empty: Add a hero to start planning.
heroes.gearNote: Gear is shared within a troop — pieces level on their own and swap freely between heroes of the same troop, never across troops. Progression: enhancement → mastery → ascend (Mythic→Legendary) → empowerment.
heroes.gearUnverified: ⚠ Enhancement XP and empowerment (mithril) costs are community-sourced and not yet verified in-game — treat as estimates.
heroes.powerNote: ⚠ Stat gains are community-modelled (wostools + WhyBanditWhy, cross-checked) — verify in-game. Empowerment bonuses not included yet.

helios.sub: T11 Helios troop research (War Academy). Costs Steel + Fire Crystal Shards. Set each node current → target; pick how many troop types you are maxing.
helios.note: Single-source data, pending cross-check. Per-level research times are not published (no time shown). Helios troop training cost is not published.

experts.sub: Dawn Academy experts — Affinity track. Add an expert and set its current → target affinity level to see the Expert Sigils needed.
experts.note: Affinity (Expert Sigils) track only — the skill "Books of Knowledge" track isn't modelled yet. Data from wostools/woscalculator.

upgrade.timePartial: Fire Crystal level times aren’t published, so this excludes them — the real time is higher.
upgrade.zimanCut: Zinman: −{pct}% on base resources (meat/wood/coal/iron, not Fire Crystals).

plan.sub: Everything you've set across the calculators, summed into one total.
plan.empty: Nothing planned yet — open a calculator and set a target.
plan.parallel: Times are per queue (construction, research and training run in parallel) — not added together.

stock.title: what's left
stock.hint: Enter what you already have; the shortfall updates live.

speedups.title: speedups
speedups.hint: Enter your speedup stash per queue to see the real time left.

plan.clearConfirm: Clear every calculator selection? Your boosters and stock are kept.

steps.title: steps
steps.base: base per-level values — the total above applies your boosters

refinement.title: Refinement
refinement.blurb: This upgrade needs {rfc} Refined Fire Crystals. Estimate the Fire Crystals & time to refine them.
refinement.note: Refining is RNG — figures are expected averages. Probability data is community-sourced.
refinement.ecoNote: ≈20 refines in tier 1, then 1/day to catch the daily 50% off
refinement.tipEconomic: 20 refines in tier 1 on Monday, then 1/day to catch the daily 50% off.
refinement.tipBalanced: Clears tiers 1–2 and dips into tier 3 — balanced cost and time.
refinement.tipFast: Pushes through tier 4 each week — faster, higher FC per RFC.
refinement.tipRush: Burns all 100 refines/week up to tier 5 — fastest, worst FC per RFC.
refinement.methodSources: Drop rates come straight from the game (Crystal Lab) — 5 tiers of 20 refines/week, costlier per RFC as you climb:
refinement.methodEstimate: We simulate the super-refine week by week, filling the cheapest tier first (20/tier, reset weekly) and stopping at your target — so the FC reflects the tiers you actually reach. Each day’s first refine is −50%, applied to that week’s priciest refines; time is the throughput, in days.
refinement.methodBand: Why a range? The average isn’t exact — each refine is a dice roll, so the total varies. By the Central Limit Theorem, summing many independent refines makes that total ~normal, which lets us use “mean ± deviation”. We show the central 85% (±1.44σ) as the “between” range — 85% is the width we chose, not a guarantee.
refinement.play: {bulk} in one day + 6 spread 1/day for the daily −50%.
refinement.methodFormula: To hit N RFC (what's left), the FC cost has standard deviation SD = c̄·√(N·σ̄²/μ̄³): c̄ = mean FC per refine; μ̄ and σ̄² = the mean and variance weighted by the intensity's tier mix (bar ‾ = the intensity's average). E.g. 200 RFC on economic (μ̄≈1.61 · σ̄²≈0.46 · c̄≈20.8) → ~2,580 FC, range ~2,440–2,720.
refinement.methodTableNote: FC/RFC = cost ÷ avg (e.g. T1 = 20 ÷ 1.45 = 13.8) — the tier's raw price, before the daily discount (which is applied in the result above).
refinement.methodMean: The avg (μ) column is the mean RFC per refine: μ = Σ p·x. E.g. T1 = 1×0.65 + 2×0.25 + 3×0.10 = 1.45. The variance is σ² = Σ p·x² − μ²; for T1: (1×0.65 + 4×0.25 + 9×0.10) − 1.45² = 2.55 − 2.10 = 0.45.

materials.sub: Where to get each upgrade material.
materials.caveat: Reliable, recurring sources — event shops & prices rotate over time.
materials.confNote: Confidence = how sure we are about the sources (high → cross-checked · low → uncertain).

compare.sub: Compare sets of buildings side by side — refining (RFC/FC/days) and cost.
compare.note: Each column is a set of upgrades, summed. The lowest cell per row is highlighted. Times are base (before boosters).
compare.useConfirm: Replace your building plan with Set {name}?

chief.sub: Chief gear + charms in one place — materials and the power each upgrade gives.
chief.powerNote: ⚠ Stat values are community-sourced (cross-checked across calculators) — verify in-game. All-troop set bonuses not included.

territory.sub: Place buildings on the grid; banners cover 7×7 and must connect to the HQ to hold territory.
territory.hint: Tap empty to place; tap an item to tag/edit; drag to move; double-tap to remove. Dimmed/red banners aren't connected to the HQ.

maps.title: saved maps
maps.name: map name
maps.updateHint: Overwrite this map with the current board
maps.compareHint: Compare this map with the current board

territory.urlLong: This hive is too big to share by link — some apps would cut it. Use “copy code”, download the file, or Import instead.

tour.welcomeCaption: Plan your hive, sunfire castle or state — HQ, banners, cities, bear traps.
tour.modesCaption: Edit places and moves pieces; View drags to pan. Two fingers pan in Edit too.
tour.placeCaption: Tap empty to place, drag to move, box-select several. Buildings can’t overlap; double-tap removes.
tour.tagCaption: Select a city to set its name, player ID, furnace level and power — used for labels, the legend and exports.
tour.bearsCaption: Cities join bear traps (🐻). Star one as the primary; the rest count as backup.
tour.insightsCaption: Toggle labels, a power heatmap or colour-by-primary, and find any player on the board.
tour.collabCaption: Open a room to plan the same hive in real time — everyone’s cursors and changes sync instantly.
tour.shareExportCaption: Share the blueprint as a link, code or file — or export a PNG, a draw.io file or an Excel sheet.

territory.selectHint: Select a piece to edit its tags.

collab.joinFailed: Couldn't connect — wrong password or empty room
collab.kicked: The host removed you from the room
collab.readOnly: View only — the host hasn’t given you edit access
collab.endSessionConfirm: End the session? This closes the room for {n} guest(s).

compare.title: compare hives
compare.sub: Diff two layouts (before → after) and highlight every change.
compare.bothNeeded: Load both sides to see the differences.

events.title: event calendar
events.sub: Upcoming recurring events, projected from your server age. Times are UTC + your local time.
events.serverAgeHelp: Gates events that unlock with server age (e.g. SvS ~day 80).
events.svsDateHelp: Lock the 28-day cycle exactly — otherwise cyclic events are estimates.
events.empty: No events in the next weeks for this server age.
events.note: Cyclic events drift ±1–3 weeks between states — seed an SvS date to pin them. Always confirm in-game.
events.serverNumberHelp: Auto-estimates age from the state. Leave blank to set days manually.
